zh.lifeSummary: 當Charlotte de Chateaubriand於大約1466年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯時，她的父親Rene de la Chateaubriand27歲，母親Helene d'Estouteville16歲。她於1494年與Henri de Croÿ在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1509年享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charlotte de Chateaubriand于大约1466年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯时，她的父亲Rene de la Chateaubriand27岁，母亲Helene d'Estouteville16岁。她于1494年与Henri de Croÿ在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易勒 利-達朗斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1509年享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Charlotte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

variants.name: Charlotta
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

variants.name: Charlette
meanings: feminine diminutive of   Charles  , used in England since the 17th century. It was particulary popular in the 18th and 19th centuries, in part due to the influence of firstly  Queen Charlotte  (  1744–1818 ), wife of  George III , and secondly the novelist  Charlotte Brontë  (  1816–55 ); it has again come to prominence since the 1980s, especially in England and Australia.

en.lifeSummary: When Charlotte de Chateaubriand was born about 1466, in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Rene de la Chateaubriand, was 27 and her mother, Helene d'Estouteville, was 16. She married Henri de Croÿ in 1494, in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1509, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charlotte de Chateaubriand est née environ 1466, à Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Rene de la Chateaubriand, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Helene d'Estouteville, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Henri de Croÿ en 1494, à Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1509, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charlotte de Chateaubriand um 1466 in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rene de la Chateaubriand 27 und ihre Mutter Helene d'Estouteville 16. Sie hat 1494 in Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Henri de Croÿ geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1509 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charlotte de Chateaubriand è nata il circa 1466 nel Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Rene de la Chateaubriand, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Helene d'Estouteville, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Henri de Croÿ nel 1494, nel Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1509, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Charlotte de Chateaubriandが約1466年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアール リオン-ド'アンジャーズで生まれた時，父Rene de la Chateaubriandは27歳，母Helene d'Estoutevilleは16歳であった。1494年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアール リオン-ド'アンジャーズでHenri de Croÿと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1509年に44歳で死去した。

ko.Of Le Lion-D'Angers,, France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스
ko.Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays d: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스
ko.Le Lion-D'Angers,Maine-Et-Loire,France: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스
ko.lifeSummary: Charlotte de Chateaubriand(이)가 대략 1466년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rene de la Chateaubriand(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helene d'Estouteville(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1494년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 일 리오-드'아그르스에서 Henri de Croÿ(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1509년 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charlotte de Chateaubriand nasceu aproximadamente 1466, em Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Rene de la Chateaubriand, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Helene d'Estouteville, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri de Croÿ em 1494, em Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1509, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charlotte de Chateaubriand родилась около 1466 г. в местности л лион-д'ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Rene de la Chateaubriand было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Helene d'Estouteville, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri de Croÿ в 1494 г. в местности л лион-д'ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1509 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charlotte de Chateaubriand nació aproximadamente 1466, en Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Rene de la Chateaubriand, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Helene d'Estouteville, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Henri de Croÿ en 1494, en Le Lion-d'Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1509, a la edad de 44 años.
